title: pikraino #4087
definition:
1) to make bitter
    1a) to produce a bitter taste in the stomach
 2) to embitter. exasperate
    2a) render angry, indignant
    2b) to be embittered, irritated
    2c) to visit with bitterness, to grieve (deal bitterly with)
